title: Verify Cancellation Flow with Incentive Conversion
description: Test that a user attempting to cancel is shown the loss aversion gate, proceeds, sees the discount offer, and successfully converts to a paid subscriber.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and part of the Trial Corner cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 3. Verify the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up appears with the headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.'
4. Click the secondary action 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
5. Verify the 'Incentive' pop-up appears with the backend-configured discount (e.g., '50% off your first month').
6. Click the primary action to accept the offer (e.g., 'Grab Offer').
7. Complete the payment for the discounted amount.
8. Verify the user's trial remains active and their next billing cycle is updated with the discount.

expected_result: The user successfully accepts the discount offer, their trial is not cancelled, and their subscription is set to renew at the discounted price after the trial ends.
